name: CLysis
description: AI-powered framework for understanding, analyzing, and modernizing legacy systems. 13 domain-specific skills and 7 chained workflows across 5 plugins — from investigation to analysis, execution, knowledge management, and process improvement.

plugins.name: legacy-investigation
plugins.description: Investigation and understanding skills for legacy systems: code exploration, service specification, and project navigation.

plugins.name: legacy-analysis
plugins.description: Analysis and planning skills for legacy systems: impact analysis, legacy system understanding workflow, and distortion pattern detection.

plugins.name: legacy-execution
plugins.description: Execution and review skills for legacy systems: diff-based change proposals, automated PR creation, and code review.

plugins.name: legacy-knowledge
plugins.description: Knowledge management skills for legacy systems: converting investigation results into reusable domain knowledge.

plugins.name: legacy-workflow
plugins.description: Process improvement skills for legacy system teams: KPT retrospectives and skill quality optimization.
